x-enumeration-literals.name: Cashback Certificate
x-enumeration-literals.description:
A certificate that provides a fixed or percentage-based monetary refund applied to the customers account after redemption.

Comment:
$50 Cashback Certificate valid for 90 days
5% Spend Cashback Certificate capped at $100

x-enumeration-literals.name: Discount Certificate
x-enumeration-literals.description:
A certificate that provides a percentage or fixed-amount reduction on eligible purchases.

Comment:
20% Dining Discount Certificate
$30 Off on Minimum $150 Spend

x-enumeration-literals.name: Voucher / Gift Certificate
x-enumeration-literals.description:
A certificate representing a prepaid or sponsored value redeemable with specific partners or merchants.

Comment:
$100 Travel Voucher
Retail Gift Card Certificate

x-enumeration-literals.name: Bonus Points Certificate
x-enumeration-literals.description:
A certificate that grants additional loyalty or reward points upon redemption.

Comment:
5,000 Bonus Points Certificate
Double Points Weekend Certificate

x-enumeration-literals.name: Fee Waiver Certificate
x-enumeration-literals.description:
A certificate that removes or reduces specific banking fees.

Comment:
Annual Fee Waiver Certificate
Free International Transfer Certificate

x-enumeration-literals.name: Interest / Rate Boost Certificate
x-enumeration-literals.description:
A certificate that provides a temporary increase in interest rate or preferential rate benefit.

Comment:
+1% Savings Rate Boost for 3 Months
Preferential Loan Rate Certificate

x-enumeration-literals.name: Tier Upgrade Certificate
x-enumeration-literals.description:
A certificate granting temporary or conditional upgrade to a higher rewards or membership tier.

Comment:
Gold Tier Upgrade for 60 Days

x-enumeration-literals.name: Non-Monetary Reward Certificate
x-enumeration-literals.description:
A certificate that entitles the customer to a service, event, or experiential benefit rather than direct monetary value.

Comment:
Airport Lounge Access Certificate
Complimentary Concierge Service Certificate
